applicable_scenarios: Full-duplex RF ADC and RF DAC top-level integration
Shared transceiver tuning with auxiliary PMOD or FMC control

artifacts.summary: Representative MxFE mixed top-level wiring for RX, TX, PMOD control, and TDD sideband hooks.
Board-specific block-design entry that sets RX and TX MxFE parameters and sources the mixed fragment.
Reusable mixed RF ADC and RF DAC fragment with PMOD control, TDD wiring, and shared transceiver tuning.
Minimal project wrapper that adds top, constraints, and shared support files.
Representative MxFE mixed reference-clock and sideband constraints.
